caveat: The first score-file snapshots were overwritten by the coupled deterministic regeneration, so byte-level equality between the two invocations cannot be established retrospectively. Aggregate metrics are identical to full precision and no third invocation exists.
conclusion: Protocol-valid under the pre-registered doc/16 section 5.2 one-recheck branch, with the invocation count retained transparently. This is not described as a single evaluator invocation.
reason: The first evaluation triggered the frozen r<0.3 and M4>=0.65 low-recovery diagnostic. The R1 script then added diagnostic reporting and regenerated the coupled R1b/R1a outputs once before the authorized recheck.
rule: doc/16 section 5.2: inspect implementation/feature-metric mismatch and recheck once
